description: Core switch failure on core-switch-01 at 08:42 UTC. Complete hardware failure requiring immediate replacement. Cisco emergency support engaged. Switch replacement cannot wait for next maintenance window.
review_notes: PIR-2025-0078 completed. Root cause: power supply failure caused cascading hardware failure. Cisco replaced switch under warranty. Configuration restored from automated backup. Total downtime: 5 hours 48 minutes. Recommendations: add redundant power supply monitoring, pre-stage spare switch.

description: Oracle DBA remote session extended 30 minutes past maintenance window to complete RAC cluster patching. Work in progress could not be safely interrupted.
review_notes: Extension justified — RAC patching is an atomic operation. Interruption would have required full rollback. Oracle session was recorded via CyberArk PAM (REC-2025-VPN-0208).

description: SSL certificate for api.ironclad.io expired unexpectedly at 16:00 UTC due to monitoring gap. Certificate renewal required outside maintenance window.
review_notes: Certificate renewed within 45 minutes. Root cause: certificate monitoring alert was silenced during earlier false alarm and not re-enabled. Recommendation: add secondary monitoring for certificate expiry.
